Bad at money? YNAB can help.
Get YNAB. Get good at money.
Worried about money? You might be bad at money.
Never worry about money again.
Get good
at money.
Start your free trial and get good at money.
Never worry about money again.
Get YNAB and never worry about money again.
92% feel less stressed since starting YNAB.
Get YNAB. Never worry about money again.

We’re #1 for a reason…
(and not just because our mom said so.)
YNAB simplifies spending decisions, clarifies priorities, and brings more joy to every day and every dollar by making it easy to get good at money. Just give every dollar a job and never worry about money again.
Learn More About the YNAB Method
90%
say their finances are in a better place since starting YNAB*
91%
say YNAB has changed the way they think about money*
70%
of YNABers could live for 3 months or more on savings*
93%
have recommended YNAB to friends or family*
*based on survey responses
Learn More About the YNAB Method
“YNAB isn’t just a tool for money management. It’s a tool for self-actualization. Who do you want to be, and how can the money you earn help you get there?”
Adrienne So,
Senior Associate Reviews Editor for
WIRED
Why YNAB Works
92% of YNABers feel less money stress since starting. You’re next.
Learn our secret sauce
Our method has only one ingredient: Give every dollar a job. We’ll teach you how.
Fund your wildest dreams...and your water bill
Our app will guide you through the process of making a flexible, proactive plan to have what you need and get what you want.
Get good at money
Improve relationships, sleep better at night, and achieve your goals by learning to use your money to live a life you can love.
Start Your Free 34-Day Trial
The average user saves $600 in their first month and $6,000 their first year.
And we don’t like to play favorites or anything, but you seem well above average to us. Are you ready to get good at money? You seem ready. We're already impressed.
I realized that money was a tool that would help me create my dream life.
YNAB truly helped me buy freedom from a toxic relationship, the flexibility to spend time with my kids, and the ability to pursue my biggest dreams.
Kathryn
YNABer since 2015
I went from living paycheck to paycheck, to having $42K saved in one year.
YNAB has removed the stress of money from my life and in doing so has helped make me a better husband.  It's like I got to remove a personal flaw I had never been able to fix.
Kyle
YNABer since 2020
I slayed $30K of debt, reclaimed my freedom, and now I’m living wild and free.
I now live a life of empowered spending and am headed for an early retirement, knowing I’ll never have to compromise my values for a paycheck.
Wave
YNABer since 2015
What will you accomplish with YNAB?
I want to…
Feel organized
about my finances
Enjoy Adulthood
Arrow Right
Be less stressed
about money
Make Change
Arrow Right
Stop arguing about money with my partner
Conquer Conflict
Arrow Right
Pay off debt and
stay out for good
Destroy Debt
Arrow Right
Save more money
without feeling restricted
Save Yourself
Arrow Right
Have money saved
for next month
Build a Buffer
Arrow Right
Feel confident with
an irregular income
Create More Balance
Arrow Right
Get YNAB. Get Good at Money.
You put so much effort into making money, shouldn’t you invest the same time, attention, and care into spending it? YNAB helps you get good at money so you never have to worry about money again.
Start Your Free Trial

Your Privacy Choices
We process your personal information to measure and improve our sites and service, to assist our marketing campaigns and to provide personalised content and advertising. By clicking the button on the right, you can exercise your privacy rights. For more information see our
Privacy Policy
Your Privacy Rights
OK
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Data
Although our advertising activities are a common way for companies to promote products and services, certain laws categorize these activities as "selling" personal information or "sharing" or "processing" personal information for targeted advertising purposes – even though we never provide information in exchange for money. We want to be clear that we do not under any circumstances "sell" the information you provide through the YNAB Product (as defined in the
Privacy Policy
) or "share/process" it for targeted advertising purposes, including any information collected through a bank data vendor or that you may provide to YNAB while budgeting.
You can set this toggle to off (meaning, switch it from green to gray) and click "Confirm My Choices" to opt out of us selling or sharing/processing your personal information for targeted advertising and related purposes discussed above for this browser/device. You should opt out on each site/app on each browser/device you use to access the services. You must also renew this choice if you clear your cookies or your browser clears your cookies (i.e., if your browser is set to automatically delete cookies after a certain timeframe).
Please fill out the form
here
to opt out of our "selling" and "sharing" through means other than browser technologies, like cookies (e.g., providing a hashed identifier to a social media platform to show you an ad on that platform). If you enable a browser-based opt-out control (such as the Global Privacy Control), it will opt-out this browser for cookie-based "sales" and "sharing," but you must still fill out that form to opt out for non-cookie-based sales/sharing.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Essential Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for YNAB to function and cannot be switched off. We use cookies like these to keep you logged in or save your preferences—like the cookie preferences you're setting right now. These cookies do not store any personal information.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow YNAB to deliver enhanced personalization and features. They may be set by YNAB or by a third party that provides a service we use. Without these cookies, these features may not function properly.
Share or Sale of Personal Data/Targeted Advertising
Share or Sale of Personal Data/Targeted Advertising
As a California consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale or sharing of your personal information at any time across business platform, services, businesses and devices. You can opt-out of the sale and sharing of your personal information by using this toggle switch. As a Virginia, Utah, Colorado and Connecticut consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale of your personal data and the processing of your personal data for targeted advertising. You can opt-out of the sale of your personal data and targeted advertising by using this toggle switch. For more information on your rights as a United States consumer see our privacy notice.
Targeting Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies help us to understand our advertising performance and help us block ads from reaching current customers. These cookies may be set by YNAB or our advertising partners and don't contain any personal information. Without these cookies, you won't have a targeted advertising experience.
Performance Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies help us analyze how well our site is working, from site visits to feature usage. We use these cookies to help improve YNAB for everyone. The information in these cookies is completely anonymous. Without these cookies, we won't be able to measure how well YNAB is operating for you.
Back Button
Cookie List

Arrow Right
Start Your Free Trial
Save
$600
in one month, $6,000 in one year
View Pricing
Arrow Right
You’re bad at money (but not a bad person).
Use YNAB to get good at money.
And live your best life—free of money worry.
Never worry about money again.
Can you put a price on inner peace? Not really. But $109 a year will get you pretty close.
Annual Plan
$9.08 USD*/month
$70 Savings!
$109 USD* paid annually
That's 30 cents a day!
Monthly Plan
$14.99 USD*/month
*USD; plus tax where applicable
You’ll save that much almost immediately. You’ll feel better too.
How About 34 Days for Free?
No credit card required!
How does it feel to get good at money?
91%
say YNAB has changed the way they think about money for the better.*
78%
of YNABers spend money without feeling guilty  since starting YNAB.*
70%
could support themselves on savings for 3 months or more.*
Life is short. Spend it well with YNAB.
Rene used YNAB to hit the road with her terminally ill pup when she realized their time together was limited. The memories made and the freedom experienced inspired her family to continue their adventures—without worrying about the cost. Getting good at money will enrich your life in multiple ways.
Play Button
Hit the Road
“Knowing exactly where you’re going to put your dollars and watching the amount grow is so satisfying,
and it helps you understand that money is always under your control.
”
-Rene
Try YNAB for
34
days (for free!) and see how life changes.
Here’s how it works:
Start making a plan for your money
🏦 Connect all of your accounts and track them in one place.
💳 Make a plan to tackle debt.
🎯 Set goals and track your progress.
When you spend or make money
🤑️ Practice the
YNAB Method
and give every dollar a job.
💸 Import transactions and track your spending.
😄 Enjoy more confidence, clarity, and contentment.
One week before your trial ends
✉️ We will send a reminder before your trial expires.
Day 34
⌛️ Free trial ends. No need to cancel! You won’t be charged unless you subscribe.*
🙌 Sign up for a subscription to keep getting good with money.
🫶
Share your subscription
with up to 5 favorites.
*when you sign up directly through YNAB; third-party app stores may require credit card information when signing up for a trial
A few of the features you need to succeed.
YNAB makes it easy to get good at money...
Learn More About Features
Focus on your finances
See account balances, priorities, goals, and transactions wherever you go with real-time syncing across devices.
Share your subscription
Share YNAB with partners, families, and other close-knit groups of up to six people—all for the price of a single subscription!
Set saving goals
Prioritize spending and savings goals with our powerful target-setting features, and track your progress at a glance.
Demolish debt
Enjoy future-focused freedom with debt management features, including an integrated loan calculator.
Learn More About Features
Still wondering if YNAB is worth it?
We’ll have Ernie drive to your house to prove it, if necessary.* Until then, check out what other YNABers have to say.
*That’s not a threat, Ernie is very nice.
I’m loving the app so far—paying monthly for an app like this seemed crazy before I got settled into it but now I’m not worried about money, have savings, and haven’t had an overdraft in months. I’m absolutely going to keep it going.
Eric,
5 months into using YNAB
YNAB is the best purchase I make every year!!!! There simply isn’t anything else out there that compares to the level of dedication, service, education, community and authenticity that you all represent.
Patti,
YNABer since 2007
A year of YNAB costs less than a massage and is a heck of a lot better for reducing stress.
Kat,
YNABer since 2016
Frequently asked questions
Is my data safe with YNAB?
There’s a saying that if you’re not paying for the product, YOU’RE the product. When it comes to something as private and confidential as your financial data, we want the reins in your hand. We only want to make money from you paying us money, with you fully knowing and understanding what’s going on.
You pay us the monthly or annual subscription price, and there you have it. That’s it. Transaction complete. That’s how we make our money.
Read more about why we don’t (and won’t) sell your data.
How much can I expect to save with YNAB?
On average, new YNABers save $600 in their first month with YNAB. Oh, and more than $6,000 after one year. Also, they enjoy more control and less stress. In terms of an investment, that’s a serious return.
But you don’t have to take our word for it.
Let the numbers speak for themselves.
Do you really give college students YNAB for free?
We offer all college students a free 365-day trial. If you’re interested, check out
our College Program
to submit proof of enrollment—think student ID card, transcript or tuition statement (but anything that shows you are currently enrolled and includes your name, your school, and the date will do). We can’t wait to help you get good with money!
Can I offer YNAB as a benefit to my employees?
Most certainly!
Financial Wellness by YNAB
is a benefits program that combines YNAB app access with our award-winning support and financial education. We help employees get good with money so they can be fully present to collaborate, create, and connect when they're at work.
You can learn more at
ynab.com/wellness
.
Do you have a YNAB family plan?
Yes, it's all included in your YNAB subscription!
You can share your YNAB with partners, families, and other close-knit groups of up to six people
—all for the price of a single subscription.
Does bank import work for non-US/Canadian banks?
Direct import currently supports select US, Canadian, UK, and EU Banks. If you don’t live in any of those regions,
File-Based Import
works like a charm. (It’s seriously slick, you should try it.)
Is the exchange rate taken into account with pricing?
YNAB is priced in US dollars. Exchange rates are not reflected in the price.
Is a credit card required to sign up?
Nope, no credit card needed when you sign up directly through us! Sign up and try YNAB free for 34 days without ever entering your credit card by using the Free Trial button above. At the end of your free trial, you can pick one of the plans (monthly or yearly) and enter your payment method.
Keep in mind that third-party app stores may require credit card information when signing up for a trial.
Does YNAB support multiple currencies?
You can select the currency you want to use in YNAB, but you can’t use multiple currencies together in a single spending plan.
I have YNAB 4, do I need to buy it again?
If you’d like to use the new YNAB, you will need to create a new account, sign-up for a free, 34-day trial, and then (hopefully!) purchase a subscription. If you’d like to continue using YNAB 4, check out
this page
for all of the details on compatibility and support.
If I upgrade from YNAB 4, is there a discount for existing users?
Yes!
Upgrade here
, and a 10% lifetime discount will be automatically applied to your annual subscription.
How do I move my YNAB 4 financial plan to the new YNAB?
Follow the steps
in this article
to migrate your YNAB 4 account!
Get good at money.
Try the life-changing money app that helps you never worry about money again.
Start Your Free Trial

Always Active
These cookies are necessary for YNAB to function and cannot be switched off. We use cookies like these to keep you logged in or save your preferences—like the cookie preferences you're setting right now. These cookies do not store any personal information.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow YNAB to deliver enhanced personalization and features. They may be set by YNAB or by a third party that provides a service we use. Without these cookies, these features may not function properly.
Share or Sale of Personal Data/Targeted Advertising
Share or Sale of Personal Data/Targeted Advertising
As a California consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale or sharing of your personal information at any time across business platform, services, businesses and devices. You can opt-out of the sale and sharing of your personal information by using this toggle switch. As a Virginia, Utah, Colorado and Connecticut consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale of your personal data and the processing of your personal data for targeted advertising. You can opt-out of the sale of your personal data and targeted advertising by using this toggle switch. For more information on your rights as a United States consumer see our privacy notice.
Targeting Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies help us to understand our advertising performance and help us block ads from reaching current customers. These cookies may be set by YNAB or our advertising partners and don't contain any personal information. Without these cookies, you won't have a targeted advertising experience.
Performance Cookies
Switch Label
label
These cookies help us analyze how well our site is working, from site visits to feature usage. We use these cookies to help improve YNAB for everyone. The information in these cookies is completely anonymous. Without these cookies, we won't be able to measure how well YNAB is operating for you.
Back Button
Cookie List

Filter Icon

Page Not Found
The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Here are some tips to get back on track:
‍
* Try pressing the back button on your browser.
*
Click here
to go to the home page.
We process your personal information to measure and improve our sites and service, to assist our marketing campaigns and to provide personalised content and advertising. By clicking the button on the right, you can exercise your privacy rights. For more information see our
Privacy Policy
Your Privacy Rights
OK
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Data
Although our advertising activities are a common way for companies to promote products and services, certain laws categorize these activities as "selling" personal information or "sharing" or "processing" personal information for targeted advertising purposes – even though we never provide information in exchange for money. We want to be clear that we do not under any circumstances "sell" the information you provide through the YNAB Product (as defined in the
Privacy Policy
) or "share/process" it for targeted advertising purposes, including any information collected through a bank data vendor or that you may provide to YNAB while budgeting.
You can set this toggle to off (meaning, switch it from green to gray) and click "Confirm My Choices" to opt out of us selling or sharing/processing your personal information for targeted advertising and related purposes discussed above for this browser/device. You should opt out on each site/app on each browser/device you use to access the services. You must also renew this choice if you clear your cookies or your browser clears your cookies (i.e., if your browser is set to automatically delete cookies after a certain timeframe).
Please fill out the form
here
to opt out of our "selling" and "sharing" through means other than browser technologies, like cookies (e.g., providing a hashed identifier to a social media platform to show you an ad on that platform). If you enable a browser-based opt-out control (such as the Global Privacy Control), it will opt-out this browser for cookie-based "sales" and "sharing," but you must still fill out that form to opt out for non-cookie-based sales/sharing.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Essential Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for YNAB to function and cannot be switched off. We use cookies like these to keep you logged in or save your preferences—like the cookie preferences you're setting right now. These cookies do not store any personal information.

You can opt-out of the sale and sharing of your personal information by using this toggle switch. As a Virginia, Utah, Colorado and Connecticut consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale of your personal data and the processing of your personal data for targeted advertising. You can opt-out of the sale of your personal data and targeted advertising by using this toggle switch. For more information on your rights as a United States consumer see our privacy notice.

Reversing the YNAB File Format – Part 1: JSON Structure

analysis.name: YNAB
analysis.tagline: Bad at money? YNAB can help. Get good at money.
analysis.value_proposition: A zero-based budgeting app that teaches users to give every dollar a job, eliminating money stress and building savings through intentional spending.
analysis.ideal_customer: Individuals and couples seeking to break the paycheck-to-paycheck cycle, pay off debt, and build savings through an opinionated budgeting methodology

features.name: zero-based budgeting
features.description: Core method requiring every dollar of income be assigned a job (category) before spending

features.name: bank account linking
features.description: Connect bank and financial accounts for automatic transaction import via Plaid

features.name: file-based import
features.description: Import transactions manually via file upload as an alternative to direct bank connection

features.name: transaction tracking
features.description: Log, categorize, and review all income and spending transactions

features.name: real-time sync across devices
features.description: Budget state syncs instantly across web, iOS, and Android apps

features.name: goal setting and targets
features.description: Set savings and spending targets per category and track progress at a glance

features.name: debt management
features.description: Dedicated features for planning and tracking debt payoff

features.name: loan calculator
features.description: Integrated loan calculator to model debt payoff timelines

features.name: credit card tracking
features.description: Dedicated handling for credit card spending and payment planning

features.name: subscription sharing
features.description: Share a single subscription with up to 6 people (partners, family members)

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Native iOS and Android apps with Spaces for navigating budget, transactions, and account views

features.name: web app
features.description: Full-featured browser-based budgeting interface

features.name: spending reports and reflection tools
features.description: Tools to review past spending and reflect on financial patterns

features.name: plan tab (budget view)
features.description: Primary budgeting workspace showing categories, balances, and allocations — formerly called 'Budget' tab, renamed to 'Plan'

features.name: free workshops
features.description: Live and on-demand educational workshops on budgeting and YNAB method

features.name: help center and guides
features.description: Extensive documentation, guides, and FAQ for learning the YNAB method and app

features.name: blog
features.description: Editorial content on personal finance topics

features.name: certified coaching
features.description: Access to YNAB-certified financial coaches for personalized guidance

features.name: college student program
features.description: Free 365-day trial for enrolled college students with proof of enrollment

features.name: workplace / employer program
features.description: Financial Wellness by YNAB — employer-sponsored benefit combining app access with financial education

features.name: public api
features.description: Developer API for reading and interacting with YNAB budget data programmatically

features.name: referral program
features.description: Refer a friend and earn rewards; also refer your employer for workplace program

features.name: gift subscriptions
features.description: Ability to purchase and gift a YNAB subscription to someone else

features.name: 34-day free trial
features.description: Full-featured trial with no credit card required when signing up directly through YNAB

features.name: account balance dashboard
features.description: View all linked account balances, priorities, and goals in one place

differentiators: Opinionated zero-based budgeting methodology ('give every dollar a job') taught as a skill, not just tracked
Subscription sharing for up to 6 people at no extra cost
Average new user saves $600 in first month and $6,000 in first year (self-reported survey data)
Does not sell or share user financial data for advertising — revenue solely from subscriptions
34-day free trial with no credit card required (direct signup)

recent_ships.what: Renamed 'Budget' tab to 'Plan' across all apps
recent_ships.source: docs: 'We're renaming the "Budget" tab to "Plan" in all our apps.'
docs: 'Spaces in (and out of) the Mobile App — February 18 2026'

praised: Reduces money stress: '92% feel less stressed since starting YNAB'
Changes mindset around money: 'YNAB has changed the way they think about money' (91% per survey)
Strong savings outcomes: users report going from paycheck-to-paycheck to $42K saved in a year
Debt elimination: users report paying off $30K+ in debt

'YNAB is the best purchase I make every year!!!! There simply isn't anything else out there that compares to the level of dedication, service, education, community and authenticity' — Patti, YNABer since 2007
Partnership and relationship improvement: 'helped make me a better husband'
No overdrafts after starting: 'haven't had an overdraft in months' — Eric, 5 months in
Guilt-free spending: 78% spend money without feeling guilty since starting
complaints: Price friction: 'paying monthly for an app like this seemed crazy before I got settled into it' — Eric
Direct bank import partially removed (HN thread: 'YNAB will partly remove direct bank imports')
Some users seeking free alternatives (HN: 'Ditch your budget app subscription. Surebeans is a modern YNAB4')

pricing_signal.free_tier: 34-day free trial (no credit card required for direct signup); 365-day free trial for college students with proof of enrollment
